title: Physics Explosion with Custom Ackermann AMR on Movement
description: Custom Ackermann car (OnShape parametric design) explodes/flies apart when physics simulation starts in Isaac Sim 5.1.0. Stock F1Tenth.usd works; issue with imported custom USD + ROS bridge.

title: omni.datastore Exclusive Lock Error on Headless Standalone
description: omni.datastore fails to acquire exclusive lock (256>=256) on DerivedDataCache when running python.sh standalone headless. Blocks CI/CD and cloud pipelines.

title: Mecanum Wheel Physics Pivot Mismatch and Jitter in Imported USD
description: Mecanum wheel physics show pivot mismatch and jitter after USD import. Joint/physics instability pattern similar to Ackermann issue.

title: LidarRTX StableIDMap Missing Object IDs
description: When recording scenes with LidarRTX, some assets return object IDs not in the StableIDMap. Breaks perception pipelines relying on consistent ID mapping.

title: ROS 2 Install Fails on IGX Orin dGPU — Kernel/Driver Conflict
description: Installing ROS 2 Humble on IGX Orin after Isaac Sim 5.1 fails. Kernel upgrade fixes ROS 2 but breaks GPU driver. Catch-22 for Nova Carter workflow.

title: Nucleus Connection Fails Cross-Machine
description: Add Nucleus Connection fails when connecting Isaac Sim from a remote machine on the same network, despite Nucleus web UI being accessible at :8080.

title: Jetson AGX Thor WebRTC Livestream Not Working
description: Headless Isaac Sim 5.1.0 on Jetson AGX Thor cannot serve WebRTC livestream to remote browser. Core workflow for headless-on-edge use cases.

title: Synthetic Data Generation Workflow Gaps for Defect Detection
description: User generating synth data for aerospace blade defect detection unclear how to apply defect overlays procedurally in Replicator. Documentation gap.

title: Live Session Performance Degrades with ~1000 Transform Updates/Frame
description: Performance degrades severely when pushing ~1000 transform updates per frame through Omniverse Live Sessions. Relevant for digital twin and multi-robot sim.

title: DLSS Frame Generation Missing from Render Settings
description: DLSS Frame Generation checkbox absent from Isaac Sim render settings. Users want it for interactive viewport performance.

title: WebViewWidget Revival Request
description: Request to revive omni.ui WebViewWidget for embedding web content in Isaac Sim UI panels.

title: Fluid Simulation in Isaac Sim — Realistic Pipe Flow
description: User wants realistic fluid dynamics for water flowing through pipes. Current PhysX particle-based fluid is limited. Newton engine may address.

title: Multi-GPU distributed training fails with Newton physics backend
description: torch.distributed.run with Newton backend fails on multi-GPU due to hardcoded cuda:0 in Warp/PyTorch allocations. 4 root causes: NewtonManager device, ScopedCapture device, missing device in set_joint_position_target, AppLauncher argv cleanup. Also blocks consumer GPUs without P2P.

title: Newton collision pipeline NaN divergence on mesh terrain (float32 precision)
description: MuJoCo Warp float32 causes solver divergence in ~1/4000 envs with elliptic friction cone on mesh terrain. Zero contact margin from USD import causes GJK failure. Buffer overflow silently drops contacts. Multiple workarounds required.

title: Physics explosion with custom Ackermann vehicle in Isaac Sim 5.1.0
description: Custom OnShape Ackermann car explodes on physics start. Sample F1Tenth works fine. Likely import/joint config issue.

title: Mecanum wheel physics pivot mismatch and jitter in imported USD
description: Imported USD mecanum wheels have pivot alignment issues causing physics jitter.

title: RayCasterCamera depth sensor returns all NaN values
description: RayCasterCamera outputs NaN for all data types. Other RayCaster sensors work. Debug vis shows no rays hitting terrain.

title: LidarRTX StableIDMap missing object_ids
description: Recording scenes with LidarRTX produces object IDs not in StableIDMap for some assets.

title: VSCode integration broken in Isaac Sim 5.1.0
description: Cannot open VSCode through Isaac Sim. VS Code debugger reports link address error.

title: OmniGraph ReadPrimLocalTransform node type not found
description: Warning when adding ReadPrimLocalTransform node in OmniGraph. Node type interface not found.

title: Sim2Sim transfer inconsistency with armature parameter
description: Non-zero armature values cause severe discrepancy between Isaac Lab play mode and Isaac Sim deployment. Agent stable in training but oscillates in deployment. Setting armature=0 eliminates gap.

title: URDF-to-USD converter produces non-instanceable primitives (VRAM explosion)
description: URDF with simple collision primitives converts to USD using more VRAM than mesh collisions. Instancing not applied.

title: omni.datastore DerivedDataCache lock error in headless mode
description: Headless Python standalone produces persistent omni.datastore lock errors (256>=256). DerivedDataCache contention.

title: Jetson AGX Thor WebRTC livestreaming broken in Isaac Sim 5.1.0
description: Headless Isaac Sim 5.1.0 on Jetson AGX Thor cannot stream GUI via WebRTC to remote machine.

title: ROS 2 install fails on IGX Orin with Isaac Sim 5.1
description: Installing ROS 2 on IGX Orin after Isaac Sim 5.1 breaks GPU driver. Kernel upgrade for ROS 2 kills graphics.

title: [PRE-5.1] Viewport flickering in Isaac Sim 4.5 (Windows)
description: Viewport flickering started March 23. Windows, Isaac Sim 4.5.

title: Request: built-in PID velocity controller for multirotor in Isaac Lab
description: Request for inner-loop PID controller for Crazyflie CF2X quadrotor RL. No equivalent to gym-pybullet-drones DSLPIDControl.

title: DLSS frame generation missing from Isaac Sim render settings
description: DLSS frame generation checkbox missing from render settings UI.

title: [PRE-5.1] Air-gapped deployment fails — omni.flowusd dependency solver crash (4.5.0)
description: Isaac Sim 4.5.0 exits on air-gapped L20 cluster due to dependency solver failure for omni.flowusd. Registry sync disabled but app still fails. Blocks enterprise offline deployments.

title: Isaac Sim 'Add Nucleus Connection' fails between networked Ubuntu machines
description: Nucleus Server accessible via web UI (port 8080) from another machine but Isaac Sim Add Nucleus Connection dialog fails. Network configuration/firewall confusion.

title: Isaac Sim 5.1 GUI crash on RTX 5070 Ti Blackwell — access violation in omni.kit.window.preferences
description: Isaac Sim 5.1.0 crashes ~20s after GUI startup with access violation on RTX 5070 Ti Laptop (12GB) with driver 595.79 on Windows 11. Headless works. Downgrading to 591.74 resolves. NVIDIA confirmed validated driver is 580.88; Vulkan rendering path flagged as known Blackwell issue.

title: Isaac Sim 5.1 crash on launch with NVIDIA driver 595.71 on Blackwell RTX 5070 Ti
description: Isaac Sim 5.1.0 crashes immediately after launch with driver 595.71 on RTX 5070 Ti. Multiple users confirmed with 595.71 and 595.79. Official recommendation: use 580.88 (Windows) or 580.65.06 (Linux). Also affects multi-GPU setups with Blackwell. Still OPEN.

title: Replicator annotators give empty frames on multi-GPU (semantic segmentation)
description: Semantic segmentation annotators randomly produce fully transparent frames when using 2x RTX 6000 Ada GPUs. RGB images from same frames are normal. ~50% reproducibility. Problem disappears on single GPU. Multi-GPU synchronization bug. CLOSED as COMPLETED April 1 — fix shipped.

title: Isaac Sim Core Extension circular import blocks 6.0 — sensors and ROS2Bridge unavailable
description: Circular import error prevents IsaacSim.Core extension from loading on 6.0.0. Cannot import _simulation_manager from partially initialized module. Blocks Sensors simulation and ROS2Bridge entirely. Filed internally by NVIDIA, still OPEN.

title: ROS 2 Jazzy bridge Python 3.12 vs Isaac Sim 3.11 version mismatch
description: Official tutorial Docker build produces Python 3.12 rclpy binaries but Isaac Sim requires Python 3.11. Results in ModuleNotFoundError for rclpy._rclpy_pybind11. Confirmed by second user on March 23. Different from IGX Orin kernel conflict — this is a Docker/Python ecosystem fragmentation issue.

title: PhysX CUDA error 719 on RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell during RL training — random crash after 200-1000 iterations
description: PhysX Internal CUDA error 719 during RL training on RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell. Occurs randomly after 200-1000 steps. Cascades into DOF velocity backend failures. Tested across 5 driver versions (570.x-590.x). Investigation suggested hardware power management but root cause unclear. CLOSED as COMPLETED April 2.

title: move_prim/MovePrims segfault on extension startup — USD stage not initialized
description: Calling move_prim() or MovePrims during extension startup causes segfault. MovePrimCommand re-fetches USD stage without null-checking. If stage isn't ready, C++ bindings crash instead of raising Python exception. Fix: defer to StageEventType.ASSETS_LOADED. 3 comments, still OPEN.

title: Isaac Sim standalone installer missing USD C++ development headers (pxr/)
description: Standalone installer lacks USD C++ development headers (pxr/) and pxrConfig.cmake. Impossible to compile custom USD plugins (ArResolver, custom schemas). Users must build from source or manually patch headers for ABI namespace. Blocks enterprise asset pipelines. 2 comments, still OPEN.

title: IsaacSim/IsaacLab multi-user permissions broken on shared workstations
description: Five permission problems when multiple users share one PC: extension cache symlinks, log write restrictions, datastore locking, /tmp ownership, Python install access denied. Affects 5.1 + 6.0. Group permissions workaround incomplete. Blocks academic labs and shared enterprise workstations.

title: Isaac Sim 5.1 crashes on RTX 5060 Ti Blackwell — rtx.scenedb.plugin access violation (driver 595.79)
description: Fifth confirmed Blackwell GPU crash. RTX 5060 Ti (sm_120) on Windows 11 25H2 crashes immediately on startup with access violation in rtx.scenedb.plugin during carbOnPluginStartup. NVIDIA moderator confirmed known issue with 595.xx driver branch on Blackwell. Workaround: downgrade to 591.74. Same fix as 5070 Ti case.

title: Isaac Sim 5.1.0 Windows crash on RTX 6000 + RTX A4000 — gpu.foundation renderer plugin failure
description: Two-system report: RTX 6000 + driver 595.79 crashes after startup; RTX A4000 + driver 582.08 crashes during MAVLink handshake / ZMQ. Backtrace points to gpu.foundation.plugin!omni::activity::getInstance → omni.kit.renderer.plugin. Moderator: driver 595.79 R590 branch unvalidated; recommended 580.88. Likely auto Windows driver update culprit.

title: IsaacLab WandB logging broken with skrl 2.0.0 — only system metrics, no rewards/losses
description: Upgrading to skrl 2.0.0 breaks WandB integration: logging captures only CPU/GPU system metrics, not training rewards/losses. Root cause: skrl's TensorBoard integration incompatible with WandB's sync mechanism. User provides patch to intercept metrics and redirect to WandB while disabling TB sync. Still OPEN, unassigned.

title: Feature request: LLM pipeline for auto-generating Isaac Lab environments from task descriptions
description: Proposal for 2-stage LLM system: Stage 1 physical reasoning → task schema; Stage 2 schema → Isaac Lab Python env code with validation reports. Claims reduces dev time from days to 30-60 min targeted review. Echoes broader AI-native-sim trend (Drift, SimWorld Studio, Robosynx).

title: Feature request: Newton deformable object API for coupled rigid-deformable simulation
description: Isaac Lab currently only supports deformables via PhysX. Proposal adds DeformableObject asset type and solver capabilities on Newton backend, enabling cloth folding / soft-item manipulation. 4 contributors engaged. Reflects Newton maturity pressure — users want parity with PhysX feature set.
